storyInfo: Amiya's team arrives at the village after the fire and finds Raidian's team. They discuss what to do with the villagers and the remaining miners. Raidian goes to ask what the miners think, but something abnormal happens, and Mantra investigates.

attributes.content: The tracks end here. Up ahead is...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Hah, I don't think we need to go any further.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: What...?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: What happened here?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: <p=1>Far North, Ursus</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: This village is the closest to where the miners abandoned their vehicles. I thought we might be able to ask around...
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Hard to tell if anyone's still alive. The burn marks on the fence look recent.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We're one step too late... again!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Amiya keeps walking, until the quiet ruins are plain in view.

The fire has long gone out. The bare branches in the surrounding woods cannot even hide the twin moons. The ruins are a sickly black in the pale moonlight, a far cry from what she imagined the village would look like.
Amiya feels a brief daze, then worry, as memories of a similar scene flash back into her mind.
Mantra, we—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I'll take a team and search for survivors.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: I'll go too.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We'll be fine, and we'll be back soon.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: No, let's go together and split up over there.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I think I see someone...
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Hello! We're a rescue team! We're here to help!
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Do you live in this village? What happened here—
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Govno! Govno!
attributes.name: Villager

attributes.content: Again!
attributes.name: Villager

attributes.content: I did say we were a rescue team, didn't I? Was my Ursine weird?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: No, he's just... afraid. I can sense it.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: He must live around this place, though, if he showed up here.
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Should we follow him?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Let's not. We don't want to frighten them.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Who's there?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Oh!
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: Careful—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I-I'm sorry!
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: I wasn't, following you, on purpose!
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: Your clothes, they're like hers, so...
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: Our clothes? Do you mean this symbol?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: What's the name of this woman you're talking about?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: S-Serafina...
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: Raidian's real name.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Is this Serafina a short Liberi with four arms?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: You... know her?
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: Yes! She's our friend, and we've been looking for her.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: What's your name? Can you take us to Serafina?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm... Vetochki.
attributes.name: Young Infected

attributes.content: Follow me.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: A fire, broke out. The others are, outside the village.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Serafina was, helping us. Without her, we couldn't have, gotten here.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're miners from the Central Mining District?
attributes.name: Elysium

attributes.content: Yes. You're here, and you say you'll help. Thank goodness...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Now, we can live—
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Here we are. Just ahead!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Who's there...?
attributes.name: Haggard Miner

attributes.content: Dyadya Volya? You still, have a fever... don't sit, at the door!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I'm fine. No fever. The wound on my leg doesn't hurt anymore when I tie it up with clothes.
attributes.name: Haggard Miner

attributes.content: And who are these people?
attributes.name: Haggard Miner

attributes.content: They know, Serafina...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We come from the same pharmaceutical company. We've come to help—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya?
attributes.name: Surprised Voice

attributes.content: Amiya... it's really you!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: How did you find this place?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: It's really you...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We finally found you!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: She runs up to her colleague and gives her a big hug.
Perhaps she should not be showing her emotions in front of others like this, but she cannot decline the opportunity to let her guard down.
Nothing beats the joy of reunion, and the comfort in seeing someone whom you have been worried about for a while.
I wasn't sure when the girl said your name, but now—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm so glad.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Is everything alright, Raidian?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm fine. Sorry for making you worried.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Team Raidian, all nine members accounted for.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Thank goodness...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: How did you find this place? Did someone find the markings I left behind?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: A wise course of action.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra! I knew you would be with them.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The Doctor, Mon3tr, and I came when we lost contact with you.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The Doctor is with a researcher that we found, waiting for her to wake up. We'll meet up once communications are restored.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The Doctor is here in Ursus too?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I think we all have a lot of questions to ask each other...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: ...Rankin left with part of the group after the fire was put out.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The ones here were unwilling or unable to follow, or villagers who lived here to begin with.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I regret not being able to stop the events...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: So that's what happened...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Is this Rankin linked to Reunion?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: No... as far as I can tell, he never made direct contact with Reunion. He simply believed there was a Reunion position on the Ursus-Kazimierz border.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I've heard fugitive Infected in the Far North talking about it. Does Rhodes Island have any intel?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: (Shakes head)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: You mean these people have nothing to do with Reunion? They're just flying a banner that they happened to come across?
attributes.name: Young Voice

attributes.content: Who might you be?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Eloysius Gorchekova, Sergeant of the Imperial Guard, Vanguard Battalion. You can call me Eloysius.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: What is the Imperial Guard doing here?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Eloysius came to investigate rumors of mutated Infected in the Central Mining District. She helped us get into the district.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: It's a pleasure to meet you, Gospozha Raidian.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I am happy for your reunion, but time is short and I'll cut straight to the chase.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Were there any mutated Infected in this group of fugitive miners?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Mutated?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I'm sure you understand what I mean, as an operator of Rhodes Island.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: No... at least not the ones who stayed. We did not find any so-called mutated Infected when we examined them.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: That's strange... there's certainly something abnormal about these people. If there's nothing out of the ordinary with the ones who stayed, then we must hurry to catch up with the ones who left.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Did they tell you how they planned to proceed to the border? Or any other clues they left behind?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I don't think I'm obliged to report anything to you.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I assure you that my sole purpose here is to discover the truth about the mutated Infected and bring about order.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Deity Grypherburg seeks to protect the interests of the Infected.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm afraid I'm not convinced.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: At the Tashkent Mines, at Chorna Prison... I never saw a single noble who stood up for the interests of the Infected.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Ah... so you're Ursine too? Third Army, I take it?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: That was a long time ago.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Very well... I accept that you have legitimate reasons for your dim opinion of this nation.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Regardless, I am loyal to the motherland, and what you're trying to avoid lines up with what I'm trying to avoid, to an extent.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The miners who left are headed towards the south. They will inevitably pass through Grypherburg on their way to the Kazimierzian border.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Whether they realize it or not, whatever their actual intentions are, they'll be treated as insurgents attempting to attack the capital, once they are discovered.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Only one end awaits them, in that event.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I thought you were going to ask a question, not make a threat.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: I'm just stating the truth. I would not have to be so solemn if Gospozha Raidian here would be frank and honest with me. I need to know how these miners left, and why they fled.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Hiding the truth won't do you or them any good.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I see only a group of Infected who are only trying to survive. No one is in any position to denounce them.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: You just won't listen, would you?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Gospozha Amiya, we've traveled together for a while now. Could you perhaps help me persuade our strong-minded Liberi here?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: There's something even more urgent before that, Eloysius.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: The miners and villagers here are in a dangerous situation. They have no supplies and nowhere to go. We can't just abandon them.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: We must ensure their safety before talking about the next step.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: You don't have to worry about the villagers. I was planning to seek assistance from the Grand Duchess for the rebuilding of their village anyway. Her Imperial Highness has always been generous on such matters.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: These miners, though... they're not a problem that a letter will solve.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: If you cannot offer assistance to them, then Rhodes Island will.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Very well, I'll help you one more time, for the sake of our cooperation.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: We take the miners to Grypherburg.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Yes. We go to Deity Grypherburg and report to His Imperial Majesty the truth about the Infected mutation in the Central Mining District, turning these miners into witnesses.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: This will give Grypherburg a reason to protect them, and intercept rather than eliminate the ones who left, until the investigation into the Grand Duchess has concluded, at least.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: And after that?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I'll persuade the Chairman to request that His Imperial Majesty grant amnesty to these Infected, then ask Rhodes Island to intervene on the grounds of medical assistance.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Or maybe you only need these miners for now, and you'll have no further use of them after you bring the Grand Duchess down.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Otherwise, you have no reason to spare these Infected. I know Ursus. Whatever warmth the Tsar wants to bring to this cold soil... the Infected will never be part of it.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Take that back.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: I'm just stating the truth.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: How dare you—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: —Maybe that's true for Ursus, but I've seen enough of Eloysius that I'm willing to trust her.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Sorry, Eloysius. Raidian's simply expressing her concerns. I'm sure we all know how Ursus has historically approached the Infected problem.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: (Nods)
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Very well... thank you for your trust, even if it's only towards me.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The Guardswoman bows at them exaggeratedly, and casts one last provoking look at Raidian.
...I have one final question.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Are you authorized to do this, Sergeant?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Maybe you've been away from Grypherburg too long to know the weight that the name Gorchekova carries there.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: On the name of my house—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: You don't need to worry about anything else, other than providing medical assistance.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: ...You're telling the truth.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Of course I am.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Even if the plan works, we must get the miners to agree first.
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Yes. I'll go.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I'll explain the situation to them and ask what they think.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: There you are, Vetochki...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: There's something that we need to tell everyone. We have a choice: leave here and go to Deity Grypherburg together—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Grypherburg?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Mama said, black locusts, and cherry trees, grow on the streets, of Grypherburg.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: The sky, is bright, the fowlbeasts, build nests, they don't, fly away.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: ...There's spring there. That, Grypherburg?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Yes, that Grypherburg. Do you want to go?
attributes.name: Raidian
Vetochki
attributes.content: Yes! I wanna—

attributes.name: Vetochki
attributes.content: *cough*!
She is so eager that she lets cold air get into her throat, causing pain from the dryness.
I know you do. But what about the others?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I've never, left the mines. I...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We have to ask the others whether they're like you, if they're willing to trust us and go to Grypherburg.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: I-I'll ask. I know, they will!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Before you... came back, Darya said, we can't, get away.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Even if we, wanted to, go back, people outside would, stop us. They'll... burn us, to death.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: I'll tell her, it's not, like that.
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: You're right. It's not like that.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Darya! Darya?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Darya! We'll go, to Deity Grypherburg! Serafina has, a way!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: We'll all, go!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: ...Darya?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: The girl is sitting straight with her back against the wall. Her eyes are closed, exhaustion upon her young face like shadows.
She still breaths, but she is not doing any more than the minimum required to live.
No... we can't... stay here...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Come with me—hang on, I'll carry, you!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Darya...!
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Probably just tired. Let her rest, we'll find others—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Vetochki looks around, hoping that her friend's silence is just a coincidence.
Dyadya Volya...
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: She walks over and shakes them one by one, only to find that their backs are all straight and stiff, just like Darya.
Some are kneeling while others are standing, but they are all facing the old woman with bowed heads inside the house, as though they can hear nothing else.
Vetochki looks up, and a word slips from her mouth.
...Babushka?
attributes.name: Vetochki

attributes.content: Raidian follows Vetochki's fearful gaze.
An ancient voice fills the space in the direction that they are all looking.
Welcome...
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: The one who Ursus remembers.
attributes.name: Nadia

attributes.content: The figure's face and eyes are concealed by a hood, but somehow, Raidian has a feeling that the figure is not looking at her.
What did you say?
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Sorry for the interruption, but you're taking too long.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Everyone! I have a proposal that can ensure your safety, to the greatest extent possible.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Sergeant—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Leave the Far North with us and come to Deity Grypherburg.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: The State Council will protect you, as long as you are willing to testify against the Grand Duchess.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: His Imperial Majesty must know what happened here. Ursus must know what happened here!
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Once everything is settled, Rhodes Island, where this lady you all know came from, will provide further treatment.
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Now, anyone willing to come with me—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: They're not listening.
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: The electrical signals coming from them...
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Suddenly, a strange coldness penetrates Raidian's cerebral cortex, virtually nailing her to the ground.
She is unwilling to offer any further warnings, even if she was just about to do so just a moment ago.
What...?
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Even the most chaotic electrical signal should have been benign to her, but now she turns it into a knife to keep herself lucid.
Raidian shuts out her sensations with Originium Arts, attempting to break the shapeless restraint.
What are you—
attributes.name: Eloysius

attributes.content: Argh—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: We must—go!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Take—everyone—leave!
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.text: 'Mantra... is this the name you go by now?'

attributes.content: Mantra, I sense cold and... pain?
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: A vortex, inviting me to step inside...
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Amiya, do not look! Do not listen!
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: I—I—
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Ahh!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Shut out your senses with Arts, Amiya.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Same for you, Elysium. Stay here while I find out what's happening.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra!
attributes.name: Amiya

attributes.content: Stay back! This is not normal. They can't hear us speak—
attributes.name: Raidian

attributes.content: Whatever it is...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: It's calling to me.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: And I must face it.
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Mantra closes her eyes, and begins to picture the closed space in her mind like a mental blueprint.
She steps into the house. She will find and anchor each active consciousness here, awaken them and make them 'hear'.
At least, that is what should have happened.
No...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: There is only...
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Silence?
attributes.name: Mantra

attributes.content: Red.
Piercing red.
Red, like the blood on the snow, encroaching upon the retina.
Then, she opens her eyes.
Perseverance.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Faith.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Pain.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: The soul?
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: The soul.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: The soul!
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.text: <color=#FF4200>It is not our body that needs to be saved, but our souls.</color>
<color=#FF4200>Love and the soul are one and whole. Love makes us endure, makes us believe, makes us persevere.</color>
<color=#FF4200>And we shall meditate and share in the pain of others.</color>
<color=#FF4200>For you, for him, for all who endure pain...</color>
<color=#FF4200>Desire not your own life, decide not your own death.</color>

attributes.content: I endure.
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I believe!
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: I persevere...
attributes.name: Miner

attributes.content: Gosudar-batyushka—
attributes.name: Miner
